mapper.sql: id, user_id, username, login_ip, login_location, user_agent, login_status, login_message, login_time, tenant_id, client_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_login_log ORDER BY login_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_login_log(user_id, username, login_ip, login_location, user_agent, login_status, login_message, login_time, tenant_id, client_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{loginIp}, #{loginLocation}, #{userAgent}, #{loginStatus}, #{loginMessage}, COALESCE(#{loginTime}, NOW()), #{tenantId}, #{clientId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_login_log SET user_id = #{userId}, username = #{username}, login_ip = #{loginIp}, login_location = #{loginLocation}, user_agent = #{userAgent}, login_status = #{loginStatus}, login_message = #{loginMessage}, login_time = #{loginTime}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, client_id = #{clientId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_login_log ORDER BY login_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
